query: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes June 24 confirmed death toll latest figures, trajectory of confirmed deaths reported by authorities and Wikipedia, number of missing persons and rescue operation status

sources.title: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Nearly 3,000 people were killed, over 16,000 were injured, and tens of thousands were reported missing. USGS PAGER predicted the death toll could exceed 10,000.

sources.title: Venezuela Quake Death Toll Rises To 2,954 — Official Figures
sources.snippet: Fatalities jumped by more than 300 from Friday to 2,954. Tens of thousands more are still missing. International rescue teams began winding down search operations.

sources.title: Venezuela quake death toll rises to 2,954 as recovery shifts to reconstruction
sources.snippet: 2,954 dead, 12,666 injured; ~50,000 unaccounted for per IOM; UN-backed assessment estimated $37 billion in direct physical damage; response shifting to reconstruction.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquakes latest: Death toll climbs as rescuers continue searching
sources.snippet: Nearly 50,000 unaccounted for; at least 2,595 dead and 12,400 injured; over 862 aftershocks; searchers combing rubble with bare hands.

sources.title: Untold casualties and humanitarian needs: What to know a week from Venezuela's quakes
sources.snippet: Death toll 2,295, more than 11,200 injured, tens of thousands missing as of July 1; 72-hour window passed; UN procured 10,000 body bags; 3-year-old rescued after 6 days.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll passes 1,700 as UN continues to scale up response
sources.snippet: Authorities confirmed on Monday at least 1,719 people died; UN coordinates humanitarian assistance, warning recovery 'is going to take time.'

sources.title: Venezuela quake deaths rise to 1,450 as hopes of finding survivors fade
sources.snippet: At least 1,430-1,450 killed; 60-year-old woman rescued after 86 hours; tens of thousands still reported missing.

sources.title: 'Miracle': Trapped man rescued eight days after Venezuela earthquakes
sources.snippet: At least 2,295 confirmed dead and 13,000 homeless; man rescued after eight days under rubble in Catia La Mar following a nearly 72-hour operation.

sources.title: June 24-25, 2026 — Venezuela rocked by 7.5 and 7.2 magnitude earthquakes
sources.snippet: Death toll up to around 235, and 4,300 people injured, according to health minister in early reports.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 188 people, injure 1,520
sources.snippet: USGS says casualties could range from 10,000 to 100,000; buildings collapsed in and around Caracas, trapping at least 200 people.

sources.title: Venezuela Earthquake Update: Magnitude 7.5 and 7.2 Quakes, Latest Figures
sources.snippet: As of July 1: ~2,295 dead, 11,200+ injured, tens of thousands missing; teams beginning to stand down from active search-and-rescue by early July.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll tops 2,200 as search enters second week
sources.snippet: Official death toll climbing to 2,295 with 11,267 injured; deepening crisis over missing persons and displacements.

sources.title: The death toll is rising after major Venezuelan earthquakes topple many buildings
sources.snippet: Jorge Rodríguez put the toll on Thursday at 188 dead, 1,520 injured and 157 reported missing.
